name: imageno1-skill
description: Imageno1 Frontend OS v2.5: a Codex super-skill with full imported UI UX Pro Max execution references, tools, raw data, brand, logo, CIP, slides, banners, design-system, ui-styling, and mandatory super-run retrieval.

scripts.install:skill: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); const win = process.platform === 'win32'; const cmd = win ? 'powershell' : 'sh'; const args = win ? ['-ExecutionPolicy','Bypass','-File','scripts/install.ps1'] : ['scripts/install.sh']; const result = spawnSync(cmd, args, { stdio: 'inherit' }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
